things.name: Villa Tugendhat
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Mies van der Rohe modernist masterpiece, a key work of 20th-century architecture

things.name: Spilberk Castle
things.description: Medieval fortress with panoramic views over Brno and the Museum of the City

things.name: Cathedral of St Peter and Paul
things.description: Gothic cathedral on Petrov hill dominating the skyline with its distinctive twin spires

things.name: Ossuary at St James's Church
things.description: Second-largest charnel house in Europe with 50,000 skeletal remains

things.name: Mendel Museum
things.description: Museum celebrating Gregor Mendel's pioneering genetics research in the abbey gardens

things.name: Old Town Hall
things.description: Gothic building with the city's beloved symbols: the Brno Dragon and the Brno Wheel

things.name: Moravian Museum
things.description: Second-largest museum in the Czech Republic with exceptional natural history and prehistory

things.name: Namesti Svobody
things.description: Freedom Square, the vibrant commercial heart of Brno's old town

things.name: Augustinian Monastery
things.description: Where Gregor Mendel conducted his famous pea plant genetics experiments

things.name: Brno Dam & Reservoir
things.description: Popular lake for sailing, swimming and cycling just 15 minutes from the city
